testcase.name: test_create_invoice_without_due_date_defaults_none

failure.message: AssertionError: assert '2026-03-03' is None + where '2026-03-03' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaf2a9ae8b00>('dueDate') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaf2a9ae8b00> = {'createdAt': '2026-05-07T21:14:58.668320+00:00', 'customerAddress': '', 'customerName': 'TEST_DueDate', 'date': '2026-02-01', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_due_date_bulk.py:44: in test_create_invoice_without_due_date_defaults_none assert data.get("dueDate") is None E AssertionError: assert '2026-03-03' is None E + where '2026-03-03' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaf2a9ae8b00>('dueDate') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaf2a9ae8b00> = {'createdAt': '2026-05-07T21:14:58.668320+00:00', 'customerAddress': '', 'customerName': 'TEST_DueDate', 'date': '2026-02-01', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_bulk_update_invalid_status
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_due_date_bulk.py:168: in test_bulk_update_invalid_status assert r.status_code == 422 # validation error ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E assert 400 == 422 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
